title: galium rotundifolium var. circaezans
intro: Galium rotundifolium var. circaezans, also known as Rough Bedstraw, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various digestive issues, due to its ability to stimulate digestion and alleviate symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving gut health. Galium rotundifolium var. circaezans can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or dried extract, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate digestive discomfort.
